message:
🌱 Add ollama: Add support for amd Radeon 780M gfx1103 - override works mission (#980)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-3189-add-support-for-amd-radeon-780m-gfx1103-override-works",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: Add support for amd Radeon 780M gfx1103 - override works",
+    "description": "Add support for amd Radeon 780M gfx1103 - override works. Requested by 37+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Ollama version:\n```bash\nollama version\n```\nThis fix adds native support for AMD Radeon 780M (gfx1103) iGPU."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review AMD Radeon 780M support",
+        "description": "The AMD Radeon 780M (found in Ryzen 7 PRO 7840U and similar) uses the gfx1103 architecture. Previously, users had to manually set `HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION`. This fix codifies the workaround directly into Ollama.\n\nBIOS tip: Set VRAM allocation from 1GB up to 8GB for better performance."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix",
+        "description": "Update to a recent version of Ollama that includes native gfx1103 support.\n\nIf on an older version, use the manual workaround:\n```bash\nHSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION=11.0.0 ollama serve\n```\n\nFor Docker:\n```bash\ndocker run -d \\\n  --device /dev/kfd --device /dev/dri \\\n  -e HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION=11.0.0 \\\n  -v ollama:/root/.ollama \\\n  -p 11434:11434 \\\n  ollama/ollama:rocm\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify GPU acceleration",
+        "description": "Run a model and check performance:\n```bash\nollama run llama3 \"Hello!\" --verbose\n```\nCompare the `eval rate` with CPU-only mode to confirm GPU acceleration is active."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Native support for AMD Radeon 780M (gfx1103) was added to Ollama, codifying the HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION workaround so users no longer need to set it manually.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
